form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (29.54) over 520m at this track. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 520m (29.66) beating Queen Era in Grade 5 on April 5. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early last time, clocking 29.55 with a 0.8 lengths win at this track over 520m and making it back to back wins. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Last start won comfortably by 4.5 lengths at this track (29.44) beating Galba Major in a Grade 5 on April 5. Flying lately and expecting another strong run.

form.formComment: Impressive performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a hot 29.69 for the 520m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 520m at this track in a handy (29.78), beating Take A Break. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 29.47 with a 2.25 lengths win at this track over 520m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by a nose at this track (29.64) beating Dennis Keeping in a Grade 5 on April 5 six days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.
